message.content:
Below is a dense comparison; each point appears once where it’s most relevant. “Owner” = member/shareholder. Assumes federal rules; state rules vary.

| Category | LLC (default) | LLC electing S‑corp (Form 2553) | LLC electing C‑corp (Form 8832) | S‑corp (corporation electing S) | C‑corp (traditional corporation) |
|---------|----------------|----------------------------------|----------------------------------|----------------------------------|-----------------------------------|
| **Federal tax classification** | Pass‑through (sole prop or partnership) | Pass‑through (Subchapter S) | C‑corp (Subchapter C) | Pass‑through (Subchapter S) | Entity‑level tax (Subchapter C) |
| **Who pays income tax** | Owners on personal returns | Owners on personal returns | Corporation pays; owners pay on dividends | Owners on personal returns | Corporation pays; owners pay on dividends |
| **Default tax forms** | Sch. C (single‑member) or 1065 + K‑1s (multi‑member) | 1120‑S + K‑1s | 1120 | 1120‑S + K‑1s | 1120 |
| **Self‑employment / FICA** | All net profit generally subject to SE tax (for active owners) | Owner‑employees pay FICA on “reasonable salary” only; remaining profit not subject to SE tax | Owner‑employees pay FICA on wages; dividends not subject to FICA | Same as LLC w/ S‑election | Same as LLC w/ C‑election |
| **Payroll requirement for owners** | Not required | Required “reasonable salary” to working owners | Required for working owners | Required “reasonable salary” to working owners | Required for working owners |
| **Qualified business income (QBI) deduction (199A)** | Eligible (subject to limits) | Eligible (subject to limits; only pass‑through portion counts) | Not eligible | Eligible (subject to limits) | Not eligible |
| **Double taxation risk** | No (unless C‑corp election) | No | Yes (corp tax + dividend tax) | No | Yes |
| **Tax rate on retained profits** | Taxed to owners even if not distributed | Taxed to owners even if not distributed | Flat 21% federal corporate rate | Taxed to owners even if not distributed | Flat 21% federal corporate rate |
| **Losses** | Flow through to owners (subject to basis, at‑risk, passive limits) | Same as LLC default | No pass‑through; stay in corporation | Flow through to owners (subject to limits) | No pass‑through; stay in corporation |
| **Fringe benefits for owner‑employees** | Often less favorable; many benefits taxable to >2% owners | Similar to S‑corp rules | Generally more favorable; C‑corps can often deduct and owners may receive tax‑free (with rules) | Less favorable for >2% shareholders | Often most favorable for benefits |
| **Ownership type limits** | Very flexible (individuals, entities, foreign) | Must meet S‑corp owner rules (see next column) | Very flexible | Only U.S. individuals, certain trusts/estates; no partnerships, corps, or nonresident aliens | Very flexible |
| **Max number of owners** | No federal limit | 100 shareholders (S‑rules) | No federal limit | 100 shareholders | No federal limit |
| **Classes of equity** | Very flexible (different economic rights) | Must respect S‑corp single‑class‑of‑stock rules economically | Very flexible | Single class of stock (voting differences allowed) | Very flexible (e.g., common, preferred) |
| **Raising outside equity capital** | Possible but can be awkward for VCs/angels used to C‑corps | Harder (S‑corp ownership restrictions and single class) | Easier than S‑corp; still LLC form but taxed as C | Harder for institutional investors | Standard for institutional/VC funding |
| **Investor familiarity** | Growing, but less standardized than C‑corps | Less common for institutional investors | Less common than C‑corps | Less common for institutional investors | Most familiar for investors and acquirers |
| **Owner residency** | No federal residency restriction | Cannot have nonresident alien owners | No federal residency restriction | Cannot have nonresident alien shareholders | No federal residency restriction |
| **Management structure** | Flexible: member‑managed or manager‑managed | Same as LLC default | Same as LLC default | Board of directors, officers (corporate formalities) | Board of directors, officers (corporate formalities) |
| **Corporate formalities** | Generally fewer: operating agreement,
